data.content: Enhanced settings UI with stronger purple/green styling: gradient-tinted sheet background, colored section cards, upgraded dispatch/action/pool cards, and richer repos/agents/defaults visuals while preserving behavior. Quality gates: bun run lint (warnings only, 0 errors), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test (1908 passed), NODE_ENV=production bun run build (success). Branch: worktree-foolery-0df2-pizazz-2, commit 65aeb36f70de.
